caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white and orange lettering. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white garment, and various shirts hang on racks. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red and white logo on the right that reads "ROCKET FELLY TOT". As the scene progresses, the man shifts his gaze and facial expression, moving from a slight smile while looking to the side to a more neutral expression while speaking and looking forward. His head moves slightly, and his mouth opens and closes as he talks throughout the sequence.
